Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Analyzing and optimizing system performance, a core of queuing theory, directly improves economic productivity through technological upgrading and innovation, supporting Target 8.2.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on analyzing computer system performance and efficiency directly supports upgrading technological capabilities (Target 9.5) and developing resilient infrastructure (Target 9.1).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Queuing theory can optimize urban transport systems and public services by analyzing and reducing waiting delays, contributing to sustainable cities (Target 11.2).
